features.name: Seasonal daylight cycle
features.description: Adjusts Better Days day and night speed by Serene Seasons sub-season.
examples: Longer days in summer and longer nights in winter.

features.name: Custom day and night speed
features.description: Lets users override seasonal daylight behavior with custom Better Days speed values.
notes: Requires seasonal daylight to be disabled before the custom values are used.

features.name: Season-aware snow system
features.description: Adds tracked snow accumulation, melting, and storm-aware snow behavior.

features.name: Chunk-load snow reconciliation
features.description: Loaded chunks can be reconciled toward expected snow state instead of waiting for nearby players.

features.name: Storm-history snow buildup
features.description: Current source tracks winter storm history and uses it to rebuild snow coverage.

features.name: Real-time Canadian season sync
features.description: Can map Serene Seasons sub-seasons to real calendar months in the America/Toronto timezone.

features.name: Warm-season grass and flower growth
features.description: Allows extra grass and flower growth in warm seasons when enabled.

features.name: Project Atmosphere integration
features.description: Forge build can use Project Atmosphere rain and temperature data when the mod is present.
notes: Officially optional on Forge only in this source tree.

features.name: Snow Real Magic integration
features.description: Current source and v5.0.0 release notes describe optional support for managed snow-state integration.
notes: Confirm version scope before promising support for older releases.
